warscrolls.name: Alarith Spirit of the Mountain
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Monster, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Alarith

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Stoneheart Worldhammer** is 3.

abilities.name: Rain of Stone
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3. Add 2 to the roll if the target charged this turn. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

abilities.name: With the Force of a Landslide
abilities.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s **Stoneheart Worldhammer** for each instance of **Alaithi, Rune of the Mountain** depicted on your **battle scripture**.

warscrolls.name: Alarith Stoneguard
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Standard Bearer (1/5), Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Alarith

abilities.name: Fortitude of the Earth
abilities.effect: While you have 2 or more instances of **Alaithi, Rune of the Mountain** depicted on your **battle scripture**, this unit’s Save characteristic is 3+.

warscrolls.name: Alarith Stonemage
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Alarith

abilities.name: Strength of Stone
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **Alarith Stoneguard** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect:
For the rest of the turn:
• Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target’s melee weapons.
• The target cannot make pile-in moves.

abilities.name: Raise the Earth
abilities.declare: Pick an objective within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn, each time a non-**FLY** unit (friendly or enemy) that is contesting the target objective uses a **MOVE** ability, inflict D6 mortal damage on that unit after that ability has been resolved.

warscrolls.name: Archmage Teclis and Celennar, Spirit of Hysh
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Warmaster, Unique, Hero, Monster, Wizard (4), Fly, Ward (5+), Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of **Celennar’s Moonbright Talons** is 3.

abilities.name: The Light of Truth
abilities.declare: Pick any number of different visible enemy units within 18" of this unit to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on each target.

abilities.name: Discs of the Aelementiri
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Start of Battle Round
abilities.declare: You cannot use this ability in the first battle round.
abilities.effect:
Depict a rune of your choice on your **battle scripture**.

**Designer’s Note:** *This allows you to have that rune depicted earlier in the **battle scripture** for the purposes of other abilities. Do not resolve the effect of the ‘Depict Rune’ ability as part of this ability.*

abilities.name: Aura of Celennar
abilities.effect:
Add 1 to casting rolls and banishment rolls for friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARDS** while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

In addition, this unit can use Spell abilities from the Lore of Hysh, the Lore of the Awakened Realms and the warscrolls of all friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARDS** on the battlefield.

abilities.name: Archmage
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn, Your Hero Phase
abilities.effect:
Pick 1 of the following:

***Magical Supremacy:*** Instead of making a casting roll for the next **SPELL** ability used by this unit this turn, you can use a value of 12 for the roll that cannot be modified.

***Drain Power:*** Pick a visible enemy **WIZARD** or **PRIEST** within 18" of this unit to be the target. Subtract 1 from the target’s power level, to a minimum of 0, until the start of your next turn.

warscrolls.name: Avalenor, The Stoneheart King
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Monster, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Alarith

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Firestealer Hammers** is 4.

abilities.name: Unbreakable Bulwark
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit did not charge this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, while that enemy unit is in combat with this unit, all attacks made by models in that enemy unit within this unit’s combat range must target this unit.

abilities.name: With the Force of a Landslide
abilities.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s **Firestealer Hammers** for each instance of **Alaithi, Rune of the Mountain** depicted on your **battle scripture**.

abilities.name: Call of the Mountains
abilities.effect:
While a visible friendly **ALARITH** unit is wholly within 12" of this unit:
•  You are treated as having 1 additional instance of **Alaithi, Rune of the Mountain** depicted on your **battle scripture** for the purposes of the abilities on that unit’s warscroll.
•  If that unit is picked to be a target of the ‘Depict Rune’ ability, you can apply the enhanced effects of that ability to that unit as if you had an instance of **Alaithi, Rune of the Mountain** depicted on your **battle scripture**.

warscrolls.name: Ellania and Ellathor, Eclipsian Warsages
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Ward (5+), Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Scinari, Vanari

abilities.name: Total Eclipse
abilities.declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn, the first time an enemy unit within 18" of this unit uses a command, unless your opponent spends 1 additional command point, the command has no effect, it still counts as having been used and the command points spent to use the command are still lost.

abilities.name: Equal Prodigies
abilities.declare: Pick whether Ellania will take the lead or Ellathor will take the lead.
abilities.effect:
If Ellania takes the lead, until the start of your next turn, add 1 to this unit’s power level and it has **WARD (4+)**.

If Ellathor takes the lead, until the start of your next turn, add the current battle round number to the Damage characteristic of **Altairi**.

abilities.name: Sudden Translocation
abilities.declare: This unit can only use this ability if any enemy models were slain this turn by this unit’s combat attacks.
abilities.effect: **Heal (D6)** this unit. Then, remove it from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.

warscrolls.name: Hurakan Spirit of the Wind
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Monster, Fly, Ward (5+), Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Hurakan

abilities.name: Hurricane Winds
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by this unit’s shooting attacks to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target has **STRIKE-LAST** for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Spirit of the Wind
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase
abilities.effect: If this unit used a **SHOOT** ability this phase, this unit can move D6". Add 2 to the roll for each instance of **Oreali, Rune of the Wind** depicted on your **battle scripture**. It cannot end that move in combat.

abilities.name: Hunters of Majestic Beasts
abilities.effect: The Damage characteristic of this unit’s **Bow of the Wind’s Vengeance** is 3 for attacks that target **MONSTERS**.

warscrolls.name: Hurakan Windchargers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Cavalry, Champion, Standard Bearer (1/5), Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Hurakan

abilities.name: Guided by the Winds
abilities.effect: While you have 2 or more instances of **Oreali, Rune of the Wind** depicted on your **battle scripture**, add 6" to the Range characteristic of this unit’s Windcharger Bows.

warscrolls.name: Hurakan Windmage
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Fly, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Hurakan

abilities.name: Transporting Vortex
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **LUMINETH REALM‑LORDS** unit wholly within 12" of this unit and not in combat to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Windleap
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase
abilities.declare: Pick up to 3 friendly **HURAKAN** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.
abilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, each target can use a **RUN** ability and still use **SHOOT** and/or **CHARGE** abilities later in the turn.

warscrolls.name: Hyshian Twinstones
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Ward (6+), Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords

abilities.name: Release Arcane Charge
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a **SPELL** or **UNBIND** ability for a **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD** within 3" of this **MANIFESTATION**
abilities.effect: Add this **MANIFESTATION’**s **arcane charge points** to the casting roll or unbinding roll. Then, reset this **MANIFESTATION’**s **arcane charge points** to 0.

abilities.name: Reservoir of Power
abilities.effect:
Each time a unit (friendly or enemy) successfully casts a spell while it is within 12" of this **MANIFESTATION**, give this **MANIFESTATION** 1 **arcane charge point.**

This **MANIFESTATION** can have a maximum of 6 **arcane charge points**.

warscrolls.name: Lyrior Uthralle, Warden of Ymetrica
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Wizard (1), Cavalry, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Vanari

abilities.name: Focused Fury
abilities.declare: Make a casting roll of 2D6. Add 2 to the roll if this unit is in combat.
abilities.effect: This unit has **STRIKE-FIRST** for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Champion of the Lord Phoenix
abilities.effect:
While a visible friendly **VANARI** unit is wholly within 12" of this unit:
•  You are treated as having 1 additional instance of **Varinor, Rune of Strength** depicted on your **battle scripture** for the purposes of the abilities on that unit’s warscroll.
•  If that unit is picked to be a target of the ‘Depict Rune’ ability, you can apply the enhanced effects of that ability to that unit as if you had an instance of **Varinor, Rune of Strength** depicted on your **battle scripture**.

warscrolls.name: Myari's Purifiers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Infantry, Champion, Order, Lumineth Realm-lords, Aelf, Vanari, Scinari, Alarith

abilities.name: Dazzling Light
abilities.declare: Pick an objective that you do not control that is within 18" of and visible to this unit’s **Myari Lightcaller**, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by enemy units that are contesting that objective.

abilities.name: Myari Lightcaller
abilities.effect: While this unit’s **Myari Lightcaller** is on the battlefield, it has **WIZARD (1)** and the **SCINARI** keyword.

warscrolls.loadout:
Each model in this unit is armed with Purifier Weapons. The models in this unit are:

• Myari Lightcaller (champion)
• Bahannar
• Ailenn, the Mind’s Edge
• Senaela (also armed with an Auralan Bow)

warscrolls.name: Rune of Petrification
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Ward (6+), Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords

abilities.name: Turn to Stone
abilities.effect: Roll a D3 for each enemy unit within 6" of this **MANIFESTATION**. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll. If an enemy unit has at least 3 mortal damage inflicted on it by this ability this turn, it has **STRIKE-LAST** for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.name: Sanctum of Amyntok
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Ward (6+), Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords

abilities.name: Multiple Parts
abilities.effect: When a number of damage points equal to this **MANIFESTATION**’s Health characteristic are allocated to it, this **MANIFESTATION** is destroyed and all its parts are removed from play.

abilities.name: Sigil of Yngra
abilities.effect:
While a friendly unit with a Health characteristic of 10 or less is wholly inside the ring formed by this **MANIFESTATION**:

•  That unit is not visible to enemy units.
•  Enemy abilities that would target that unit must target this **MANIFESTATION** instead.

warscrolls.name: Scinari Calligrave
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Scinari

abilities.name: Realmscribe
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Reaction: You declared the ‘Depict Rune’ ability
abilities.effect:
Replace 1 instance of a rune on your **battle scripture** with 1 of the following:

**• Varinor, Rune of Strength**
**• Ydriliqi, Rune of the River**
**• Alaithi, Rune of the Mountain**
**• Oreali, Rune of the Wind**

warscrolls.name: Scinari Cathallar
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Scinari

abilities.name: Darkness of the Soul
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target cannot use commands until the start of your next turn.

warscrolls.name: Scinari Enlightener
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (2), Infantry, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Scinari

abilities.name: Clarity of Thought
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS INFANTRY** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn, attacks that target that friendly unit cannot score critical hits (treat them as regular hits instead).

abilities.name: Rune of Enthlai
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared an **UNLIMITED SPELL** ability for this unit
abilities.effect: If that spell is successfully cast, roll a dice. On a 4+, after resolving the effect of that spell, this unit can immediately cast that spell a second time using the same casting roll. Do not count the second spell towards the number of **SPELL** abilities this unit can use this turn.

warscrolls.name: Scinari Loreseeker
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Scinari

abilities.name: Independent Operative
abilities.effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Arcane Discovery
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a non-**FACTION TERRAIN** terrain feature within 3" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: For the rest of the battle, add 1 to casting rolls for units (friendly and enemy) while they are within 3" of the target.

warscrolls.name: Scourge of Ghyran The Light of Eltharion
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Infantry, Ward (4+), Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf

abilities.name: Eternal Light
abilities.effect: If this unit is destroyed and if a friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD** successfully casts a **SUMMON** spell, instead of resolving the effect of that **SUMMON** spell, you can set up a replacement unit for this unit more than 9" from all enemy units and wholly within 12" of the unit that used that **SUMMON** spell. This ability is still in effect even if this unit is not on the battlefield.

abilities.name: Supreme Swordmaster
abilities.effect: Ignore negative modifiers to hit rolls and wound rolls for this unit’s attacks. In addition, ignore negative modifiers to the characteristics of this unit’s melee weapons.

warscrolls.notes:
This HERO can join an eligible regiment as a Lumineth Paragon.
This unit is legal for Matched Play for battles fought using the General’s Handbook 2025-26 battlepack.

warscrolls.name: Scourge of Ghyran Vanari Bannerblade
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Infantry, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Vanari

abilities.name: Defend the Banner
abilities.effect: Add 1 to save rolls for friendly **VANARI INFANTRY** units while they are contesting the same objective as this unit.

warscrolls.notes:
This HERO can join an eligible regiment as a Lumineth Paragon.
This unit is legal for Matched Play for battles fought using the General’s Handbook 2025-26 battlepack.

warscrolls.name: Sevireth, Lord of the Seventh Wind
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Monster, Fly, Ward (5+), Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Hurakan

abilities.name: Spirit of the Wind
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase
abilities.effect: If this unit used a **SHOOT** ability this phase, this unit can move D6". Add 2 to the roll for each instance of **Oreali, Rune of the Wind** depicted on your **battle scripture**. It cannot end that move in combat.

abilities.name: Searing Desert Winds
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick up to 3 visible enemy units within 6" of this unit to be the targets.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll and subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Call of the Winds
abilities.effect:
While a visible friendly **HURAKAN** unit is wholly within 12" of this unit:
•  You are treated as having 1 additional instance of **Oreali, Rune of the Wind** depicted on your **battle scripture** for the purposes of the abilities on that unit’s warscroll.
•  If that unit is picked to be a target of the ‘Depict Rune’ ability, you can apply the enhanced effects of that ability to that unit as if you had an instance of **Oreali, Rune of the Wind** depicted on your **battle scripture**.

warscrolls.name: Shrine Luminor
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Faction Terrain, Fly, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords

abilities.name: Enter the Shrine
abilities.declare: If this terrain feature does not have a Shrine Guardian, pick a friendly **LUMINETH REALM‐LORDS INFANTRY HERO** within 3" of it and not in combat to be the target.
abilities.effect: Place the target on this terrain feature. The target is now a Shrine Guardian (see ‘Shrine Guardian’).

abilities.name: Exit the Shrine
abilities.effect: If this terrain feature has a Shrine Guardian that was not placed on it this turn, set up the Shrine Guardian on the battlefield wholly within 6" of this terrain feature and not in combat. That unit is no longer a Shrine Guardian.

abilities.name: Cleansing Rituals
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn, Reaction: You declared a **SPELL** ability for a **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** unit wholly within 12" of this terrain feature
abilities.effect: While this terrain feature has a Shrine Guardian, you can re-roll the casting roll for that spell.

abilities.name: Shrine Guardian
abilities.effect:
While this terrain feature has a Shrine Guardian:

•  This terrain feature has a Move characteristic of 6" and can use non‑command non-**CHARGE MOVE** abilities as if it were a unit. It cannot end a **MOVE** ability within the combat range of an enemy unit.
•  The Shrine Guardian cannot use **MOVE** abilities and remains on this terrain feature each time it moves.
•  Instead of measuring range and visibility to the Shrine Guardian, measure to this terrain feature instead.
•  All attacks that would target the Shrine Guardian target this terrain feature instead.

If this terrain feature is destroyed, before removing it from the battlefield, inflict D3 mortal damage on the Shrine Guardian. Then, set up the Shrine Guardian on the battlefield wholly within 3" of this terrain feature and not in combat. That unit is no longer a Shrine Guardian. If it is not possible to set up the Shrine Guardian, it is slain.

warscrolls.loadout:
The following universal terrain abilities apply to this terrain feature (Terrain, 1.2):

Cover, Impassable

warscrolls.name: The Light of Eltharion
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Infantry, Ward (4+), Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf

abilities.name: Valorous intervention
abilities.declare: This unit cannot use this ability if it is in combat. Pick a friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** unit that is in combat to be the target.
abilities.effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again within 1" of the target and in combat.

abilities.name: Supreme Swordmaster
abilities.effect: Ignore negative modifiers to hit rolls and wound rolls for this unit’s attacks.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as a Lumineth Paragon.

warscrolls.name: Vanari Auralan Sentinels
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Vanari

abilities.name: Lofted Shots
abilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 6" to the Range characteristic of this unit’s **Auralan Bows** but subtract 1 from hit rolls for this unit’s shooting attacks.

warscrolls.name: Vanari Auralan Wardens
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Vanari

abilities.name: Anticipated Strike
abilities.effect: If this unit has not charged this turn, ignore the effect of the **Charge (+1 Damage)** ability for combat attacks made by enemy units that target this unit.

warscrolls.name: Vanari Bannerblade
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Infantry, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Vanari

abilities.name: World Banner
abilities.effect: While a visible friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** unit is wholly within 12" of this unit, it can use the ‘Rally’ command even if it is in combat.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as a Lumineth Paragon.

warscrolls.name: Vanari Bladelords
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Vanari

abilities.name: Guardians of the Scinari
abilities.effect: While any friendly **SCINARI HEROES** are wholly within this unit’s combat range, both this unit and those friendly units have **WARD (5+)**.

abilities.name: Masters of Combat
abilities.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s **Sunmetal Blades** for each instance of **Varinor, Rune of Strength** depicted on your **battle scripture**.

warscrolls.name: Vanari Dawnriders
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Cavalry, Champion, Standard Bearer (1/5), Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Vanari

abilities.name: Dawnrider Charge
abilities.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of this unit’s **Dawnrider Lances and Blades** if it charged in the same turn.

warscrolls.name: Vanari Lord Regent
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Infantry, Order, Lumineth Realm-lords, Aelf, Vanari

abilities.name: Wall of Blades
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly **VANARI AURALAN WARDENS** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the wall of blades. Then, pick an enemy unit in combat with the wall of blades to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice for each model in the wall of blades that is within 3" of the target. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

abilities.name: Shining Example
abilities.effect: Each time a friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as a Lumineth Paragon.

warscrolls.name: Vanari Lord Regent on Lightcourser
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Cavalry, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Vanari

abilities.name: Lead the Charge
abilities.effect: You can re-roll charge rolls for friendly **LUMINETH REALM‑LORDS** units while they are wholly within 6" of this unit.

abilities.name: Purest Aetherquartz
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase
abilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s attacks and subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target this unit.

warscrolls.name: Vanari Starshard Ballista
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: War Machine, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Vanari

abilities.name: Blinding Bolts
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that was targeted by all of this unit’s shooting attacks this phase to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if the target is a **MONSTER**. On a 3+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Scryhawks
abilities.effect: Add 6" to the Range characteristic of this unit’s **Starshard Bolts** while it is wholly within 12" of any friendly **Vanari Auralan Sentinels** units.

warscrolls.name: Ydrilan Riverblades
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Order, Lumineth Realm‑lords, Aelf, Ydrilan

abilities.name: Relentless as the Driving Current
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.effect: If this unit is in combat, it can move 2D6". It can pass through models in enemy units but must end that move in combat.

abilities.name: Travel The Waterways
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
abilities.effect:
Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.

If you picked to depict **Ydriliqi, Rune of the River** on your **battle scripture** this battle round, you can instead set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.

rules.name: Arcane Focus
rules.effect: **SPELL** abilities from the Lore of Hysh or the Lore of the Awakened Realms used by friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** **WIZARDS** have the **UNLIMITED** keyword. However, you cannot pick the same unit to be the target of the same **SPELL** ability in the same turn.

rules.name: Trick of the Light
rules.effect: Friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** units can use the ‘Power Through’ command even if they have not charged this turn.

rules.name: Strike as One
rules.effect: When players are alternating picking units to use a **FIGHT** ability, when it is your turn to pick a unit, you can pick 2 friendly **LUMINETH REALM‑LORDS** units instead of 1. Resolve the second **FIGHT** ability immediately after the first.

rules.name: Ancient Spirits
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS MONSTER** to be the target.
rules.effect: For the rest of the turn, ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to each visible friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** unit in each phase while it is wholly within 12" of the target.

spells.name: Beacon of Hysh
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly non‑**MONSTER LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** unit wholly with 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, if the unmodified hit roll for an attack that targets that friendly unit is 1-3, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.

spells.name: Piercing Refraction
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

spells.name: Overwhelming Heat
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Halve the target’s Move characteristic until the start of your next turn, then roll a dice. If the roll equals or exceeds the target’s Save characteristic, inflict D3 mortal damage on it.

spells.name: Focused Erosion
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of the target’s weapons until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Realmshield
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** units have **WARD (5+)** while they are wholly within 12" of the caster.

spells.name: Elemental Push
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** unit wholly within 12" of them that was not set up this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6. Subtract 1 from the roll if the target is in combat.
spells.effect: The target can move up to 5". It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units but cannot end that move in combat.

spells.name: Unseen Force
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target cannot use **RUN** abilities. In addition, if that enemy unit has already been picked to be the target of this ability this battle round, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s combat attacks.

spells.name: Beacons of Protection
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, ignore the first damage point allocated to friendly non-**MONSTER LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** units each phase while they are wholly within 9" of a friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD**. Add 3" to the range for each additional time this spell has been successfully cast by a friendly **WIZARD** this battle round.

spells.name: Beam of Hysh
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them that has not been picked to be the target of this ability this battle round to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6. Add 1 to the casting value of this spell for each time it has been successfully cast by a friendly **WIZARD** this turn.
spells.effect: Inflict D3+**X** mortal damage on the target, where **X** is the number of times, to a maximum of 3, that this spell has previously been successfully cast by a friendly **WIZARD** this turn.

spells.name: Summon Hyshian Twinstones
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Hyshian Twinstones** endless spell on the battlefield, pick a friendly **LUMINETH REALM‑LORDS WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Hyshian Twinstones** endless spell wholly within 18" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

spells.name: Summon Rune of Petrification
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Rune of Petrification** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **LUMINETH REALM‑LORDS WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Rune of Petrification** wholly within 12" of the caster and visible to them.

spells.name: Summon Sanctum of Amyntok
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Sanctum of Amyntok** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Sanctum of Amyntok** wholly within 12" of the caster and more than 3" from all enemy units. A **Sanctum of Amyntok** has 3 parts that must be set up touching each other so that they form a ring.

artefacts.name: Swiftfeather Talisman
artefacts.declare: Pick a friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
artefacts.effect: Add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic for the rest of the turn.

artefacts.name: Phoenix Blade
artefacts.effect: This unit’s combat attacks score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.

artefacts.name: Nullstone Beads
artefacts.effect: This unit can use the ‘Unbind’ ability as if it had **WIZARD (1)**.

artefacts.name: Phoenix Stone
artefacts.effect: The first time this unit would be destroyed, before removing it from play, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit is not destroyed and any remaining damage points inflicted on it have no effect. Then, **Heal (D3)** this unit.

artefacts.name: Waystone
artefacts.effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within friendly territory and more than 9" from all enemy units.

artefacts.name: Silver Wand
artefacts.effect: If this unit is not a **WIZARD**, it can use the ‘Unbind’ ability as if it had **WIZARD (1)**. Otherwise, add 1 to casting rolls for this unit.

artefacts.name: Aelementor Focus
artefacts.declare: Pick a terrain feature to be the target.
artefacts.effect: Measure the range and visibility of the next **SPELL** ability used by this unit from the target instead of from this unit.

heroicTraits.name: Master Duellist
heroicTraits.declare: Pick a visible enemy **HERO** in combat with this unit to be the target.
heroicTraits.effect:
Roll a dice. On a 4+:
• If the target has an artefact of power, it no longer has that artefact of power.
• The target has **STRIKE‑LAST** for the rest of the turn.

heroicTraits.name: Masterful Tactician
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared the ‘Redeploy’ command for a visible friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** unit wholly within 12" of this unit
heroicTraits.effect: If you roll a 1-3 when determining the distance that unit can move, you can use a value of 4 instead.

heroicTraits.name: Acolyte of the Runes
heroicTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS HERO** wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
heroicTraits.effect: That **HERO** can be picked as an additional target the next time you use the ‘Depict Rune’ ability.

heroicTraits.name: Flawless Commander
heroicTraits.declare: Pick up to 3 visible friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS INFANTRY** units wholly within 18" of this unit to be the targets.
heroicTraits.effect: Each target can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.

heroicTraits.name: Aetherquartz Requisitioner
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared a SPELL ability for a LUMINETH REALM-LORDS WIZARD within this unit’s combat range
heroicTraits.effect: Add 3 to the casting roll for that spell.

heroicTraits.name: Flawless Commander
heroicTraits.effect: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS INFANTRY** units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

heroicTraits.name: Martial Perfectionist
heroicTraits.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit that is damaged or that had any models slain this turn to be the target.
heroicTraits.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS INFANTRY** units that target that enemy unit for the rest of the turn.

heroicTraits.name: World-Mage
heroicTraits.effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit for each unique rune depicted on your **battle scripture**.

other.name: Cycle Manifestation
other.declare:
Pick the **Scinari Calligrave** in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick 1 of the friendly **MANIFESTATIONS** below that is not on the battlefield, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

**• Sanctum of Amyntok**
**• Hyshian Twinstones**
**• Rune of Petrification**
other.effect: If there is already a friendly **MANIFESTATION** from the list above on the battlefield, it is immediately banished. Then, set up the Manifestation you picked within 1" of the caster and visible to them. If that **MANIFESTATION** is a **Sanctum of Amyntok**, it must instead be set up wholly within 12" of the caster, more than 3" from all enemy units, and with its 3 parts touching each other so that they form a ring.

other.name: Swift Erasure
other.effect: Roll a dice for each friendly unit that was picked to be a target of that **SPELL** ability and that is wholly within 12" of the **Scinari Calligrave** in this Regiment of Renown. On a 4+, that **SPELL** ability has no effect on that unit.

other.name: Arcane Taxonomy
other.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn, Your Movement Phase
other.effect: Remove the **Scinari Calligrave** in this Regiment of Renown from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield wholly within 3" of a friendly **MANIFESTATION** and more than 7" from all enemy units.

other.name: Blinding Charge
other.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase
other.declare: Pick a unit in this Regiment of Renown that charged this turn. Then, pick an enemy **INFANTRY** unit within 1" of that unit to be the target.
other.effect: For the rest of the turn, ignore positive modifiers to save rolls for the target.

other.name: Masters of all Terrain
other.effect: Ignore negative modifiers to run rolls and charge rolls for units in this Regiment of Renown and to their Move characteristic.

battleTraits.name: Rewards of Valour
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly non-**UNIQUE VANARI HERO** that does not have an artefact of power to be the target.
battleTraits.effect:
Give the target 1 artefact of power from the 'Vanari Paragons' Army of Renown rules.

**Designer's Note:** *This artefact of power is given to the* **HERO** *during the deployment phase, not during army composition.*

battleTraits.name: Labour of Might
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), End of Any Turn
battleTraits.declare: You can only use this ability if 3 or more enemy units have been destroyed this battle.
battleTraits.effect: Add 1 to the number of **labours** you have completed. For the rest of the battle, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** units.

battleTraits.name: Labour of Control
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), End of Any Turn
battleTraits.declare: You can only use this ability if there is at least 1 different friendly unit within 6" of each battlefield edge.
battleTraits.effect: Add 1 to the number of **labours** you have completed. For the rest of the battle, add 2" to the Move characteristic of friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** units.

battleTraits.name: Labour of Precision
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), End of Any Turn
battleTraits.declare: You can only use this ability if there are no enemy units with an artefact of power on the battlefield.
battleTraits.effect: Add 1 to the number of **labours** you have completed. For the rest of the battle, add 10 to the control scores of friendly **LUMINETH REALM‑LORDS** units.

battleTraits.name: Blessing of Tyrion
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), End of Any Turn
battleTraits.declare: You can only use this ability if you have completed 3 **labours**.
battleTraits.effect: For the rest of the battle, friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** units have **WARD (5+)**.

battleTraits.name: Depict Rune
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round
battleTraits.effect:
Pick 1 of the following runes to depict on your **battle scripture**. The effect and conditional enhanced effects of that rune last for the rest of the battle round. Each rune remains on your **battle scripture** for the rest of the battle or until it is removed or replaced by another ability.

**Varinor, Rune of Strength:** Pick up to 2 friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** units for each instance of this rune depicted on your **battle scripture** to be the targets. Add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for each target. In addition, the following enhanced effects apply:
• While **Ydriliqi, Rune of the River** is depicted on your **battle scripture**, add 1 to wound rolls for each target’s combat attacks.
• While **Oreali, Rune of the Wind** is depicted on your **battle scripture**, each target can use **SHOOT** and/or **CHARGE** abilities even if it used a **RETREAT** ability in the same turn.

**Alaithi, Rune of the Mountain**: Pick up to 2 friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** units for each instance of this rune depicted on your **battle scripture** to be the targets. Each target has **WARD (5+)**. In addition, the following enhanced effects apply:
• While **Varinor, Rune of Strength** is depicted on your **battle scripture**, the targets’ melee weapons have **Anti-charge (+1 Rend)**.
• While **Ydriliqi, Rune of the River** is depicted on your **battle scripture**, subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks made by enemy units while they are in combat with any of the targets.

**Ydriliqi, Rune of the River**: Pick up to 2 friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** units for each instance of this rune depicted on your **battle scripture** to be the targets. Subtract 2 from charge rolls for enemy units while they are within 12" of any of the targets. In addition, the following enhanced effects apply:
• While **Alaithi, Rune of the Mountain** is depicted on your **battle scripture**, ignore negative modifiers to hit rolls and wound rolls for attacks made by the targets.
• If **Oreali, Rune of the Wind** is depicted on your **battle scripture**, each target can immediately move up to 3". They can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units and can end that move in combat.

**Oreali, Rune of the Wind**: Pick up to 2 friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** units for each instance of this rune depicted on your **battle scripture** to be the targets. Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by enemy units while they are in combat with any of the targets. In addition, the following enhanced effects apply:
• While **Varinor, Rune of Strength** is depicted on your battle scripture, add 4" to each target’s Move characteristic.
• While **Alaithi, Rune of the Mountain** is depicted on your **battle scripture**, add 5 to each target’s control score.

**Thalari, Rune of the Zenith**: Add 2 to casting rolls for friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** units. In addition, if you have 4 or more unique runes depicted on your **battle scripture**, add 4" to the Move characteristic of friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** units and friendly **LUMINETH REALM-LORDS** units’ attacks score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.

**Designer’s Note:** *We recommend noting the runes you have inscribed in each battle round on a piece of paper to keep track of which are currently depicted on your **battle scripture.** Feel free to note them by type (Strength, River, Mountain etc.), by initial (each has a different first letter) or, if you are feeling particularly adventurous, you can try your hand at aelven calligraphy and learn to draw each rune!*

battleTraits.name: World Runes
battleTraits.effect:
Add 1 **Alaithi, Rune of the Mountain** to your **library** for each friendly **ALARITH** unit on the battlefield.

Add 1 **Oreali, Rune of the Wind** to your **library** for each friendly **HURAKAN** unit on the battlefield.

Add 1 **Ydriliqi, Rune of the River** to your **library** for each friendly **YDRILAN** unit on the battlefield.

You can have a maximum of 6 of each type of rune in your **library**.

battleTraits.name: Entreat Spirits
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
battleTraits.declare: You can use this ability if you have 3 or more runes in your **library**. Pick a friendly non- **UNIQUE MONSTER** unit that has been destroyed to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: Remove any 3 runes from your **library**. Then, set up a replacement unit identical to the target wholly within 6" of a terrain feature and more than 9" from all enemy units. Allocate 6 damage points to the replacement unit (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).

battleTraits.name: Depict Rune
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round
battleTraits.effect:
Remove all runes from your **battle scripture**. Then, pick any number of runes to remove from your **library** and depict them on your **battle scripture**. Runes removed from your library in this way are removed for the rest of the battle.

**Designer’s Note:** *Runes are used to activate powerful abilities on your units’ warscrolls.*

battleTraits.name: The Realms Fight Back
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a terrain feature. Then, pick an enemy unit within 6" of that terrain feature to be the target.
battleTraits.effect:
Roll a D3 and apply the corresponding effect for the rest of the turn.

**1.  Eruption of Earth:** Inflict 3 mortal damage on the target.
**2.  Howling Winds:** Subtract 5 from the target’s control score.
**3.  Flash Flood:** The target has **STRIKE-LAST**.
